name: Granola
description: AI meeting notepad that transcribes device audio without a bot and enhances notes via templates and AI chat.

seo.title: Granola — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Granola: AI meeting notepad that transcribes device audio without a bot and enhances notes via templates and AI chat.

when_to_use: Transcribing customer discovery calls without a bot joining
AI-enhanced meeting notes with custom templates per meeting type
Post-meeting action items extracted and synced to Notion
Sales call summary sent to CRM automatically after the call
Structured notes from investor meetings using AI chat

pros: Captures device audio without meeting bots
Templates tailor notes to your workflow
cons: Privacy model depends on trusting local app
review.verdict: The cleanest no-bot meeting notetaker, held back by Mac-first scope and enterprise gaps.
review.best_for: Mac-using founders and consultants wanting silent, templated meeting notes.
review.not_for: Windows-heavy teams or enterprises needing strict admin and compliance controls.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
